name: Mounds Cake,just Like the Candy!
recipeInstructions:
1. Bake a chocolate cake mix in an unmarked 9x13 pan (not smaller), following the instructions on the box.
2. Heat marshmallows slowly until they are fully dissolved, along with 1 cup of milk and 1 cup of sugar. Stir well throughout the process.
3. Add sweetened shredded coconut to the mixture and spread over a warm cake layer.
4. In a separate bowl, heat 1/2 cup of sugar, 1/2 cup of milk, and 1/2 cup of shortening until boiling.
5. Stir in chocolate chips until melted. Pour this mixture over the coconut topping on top of the cake.
6. Allow the cake to cool completely before serving. Enjoy!
